title: geum longifolium
intro: Geum longifolium, also known as the long-leaved avens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Geum longifolium include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Geum longifolium can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a useful plant in traditional medicine.
